title: abronia umbellata var. breviflora
intro: Abronia umbellata var. breviflora, also known as the short-flowered desert marigold, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Nyctaginaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Abronia umbellata var. breviflora include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and improve wound healing. Abronia umbellata var. breviflora can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
